images.depicts: small skunk, big worried eyes, striped tail curled
skunk wedged in log hollow, tail and face poking out
chick, skunk, and sheep standing together in open ground, skunk free (not stuck)
images.issue: spec wants Chick/Sheep/Snake rushing toward a STUCK skunk from 3 directions; this shows the skunk itself standing free as part of the group, no urgency, no log

images.depicts: aggressive teeth-bared skunk-like animal in tug-of-war with chick over its striped tail, open ground, no log
images.issue: no log/rescue context; skunk looks hostile not stuck; doesn't match 'Chick tugging at the stuck skunk's tail to help free it'

images.depicts: snake and an angry orange-eyed chick in tug-of-war over a rope, no skunk, no log
images.issue: does not depict a rescue at all — no skunk present, looks like a fight between snake and chick

images.depicts: sheep heaving a log up on its back, a small creature on top and one underneath digging
images.issue: reasonable match for the big lift

images.depicts: a human hand petting the freed skunk, chick and sheep nearby, snake coiled close
images.issue: includes an out-of-cast human hand, otherwise conveys relief fine

images.depicts: skunk with pink ribbon/belt around middle, chick/sheep/snake standing around
potato + chick in log hollow, snake and sheep nearby staring

images.issue: spec asked for 'ball of soft yarn'; shown as rope-like cord — close enough on color, texture is off

line_map.line: Pink! Pink! Pink-pink-pink! / PINK! (think pink!) PINK!
Soft-soft-soft! SOFT! So SOFT! (shh, soft!) SOFT!
line_map.best_image_by_content: skunk-free-soft.png (the skunk's fur being described as soft)

line_map.line: Belt-belt-belt! BELT! Milk! Silk! (LLL — feel your tongue!)

line_map.best_image_by_content: sheep-lift.png / chick-helps-skunk.png (rescue theme, but neither cleanly depicts 'help')

line_map.line: A potato?! (NO!) / P-p-potato! No end blend!
Outro: Pink! Soft! Belt! Help! / Milk — not 'miuw'!

generate.mj_prompt: a full glass of milk, ultra-realistic photograph, single subject centered, dramatic spotlight on deep forest-green backdrop, soft shadows, cinematic, slightly whimsical --ar 3:2 --style raw

a small wrapped gift box with a ribbon bow, ultra-realistic photograph, single subject centered, dramatic spotlight on deep forest-green backdrop, soft shadows, cinematic, slightly whimsical --ar 3:2 --style raw

line_map.line: Help the skunk! (hook, x4) The skunk is stuck!
Chick can help! Snake can help the skunk!
line_map.best_image_by_content: chick-helps-skunk.png / snake-helps.png — neither shows an actual rescue

line_map.line: Sheep can lift the skunk! Up! Up! Help the skunk!
The skunk… is up! (hush…) A potato?! (POTATO!) Help a potato?!
